title: Implementation Plan: cdx_proxy_cli_v2 | Refactor cdx CLI: split cli/main.py God file into cli/commands/ modules, extract a declarative settings resolver to reduce build_settings() boilerplate from 200 lines to ~30, unify --force/--replace flags into consistent naming across proxy and trace subcommands, and add usage example epilogs to all subcommands. Keep full backward compatibility | v2
